summary: Full MVP testing completed. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working - landing page, registration, onboarding, login, home tab, browse tab, seasonal tab, profile tab, origami detail with step navigation and completion, favorites. Admin user has active subscription (no trial banner shown). PayPal payment is MOCKED via /api/subscription/activate endpoint.

issues: Title 'Paper Airplane' not visible in initial viewport (text selector returned false, but title is present in screenshot)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All backend endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
✓ JWT authentication working correctly with Bearer tokens
✓ Password hashing with bcrypt implemented correctly
✓ Trial subscription automatically created on registration (30 days)
✓ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
✓ Error handling implemented in API calls
✓ Loading states implemented in UI components
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 15 origami projects and admin user (admin@origami.com / admin123) by backend startup script
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full MVP tested and working. Backend has 32 comprehensive pytest tests covering auth, origami CRUD, progress tracking, and subscription. Frontend tested via Playwright with mobile viewport (375x667). All core flows verified: registration → onboarding → home → browse → seasonal → profile → origami detail → completion → favorites. PayPal payment is MOCKED. Admin user subscription status is 'active' (no trial banner). Test users get 30-day trial on registration.

test_categories.origami_endpoints: 10 tests - list, filter by skill level, search, featured, seasonal, detail
test_categories.progress_tracking: 8 tests - stats, step tracking, completion, favorites, completed list

tested_flows: Landing page loads with Get Started and Login buttons
Registration flow: name, email, password → creates user with trial subscription
Onboarding flow: skill level selection (beginner/intermediate/advanced) → redirects to home
Login flow: admin@origami.com / admin123 → redirects to home tab
Home tab: welcome message, stats cards (completed, XP, favorites), featured origami cards, seasonal banner
Browse tab: search input, skill level filters (all/beginner/intermediate/advanced), origami list
Seasonal tab: current season display, season chips, holiday cards
Profile tab: user info, stats, completed/favorites tabs, logout button
Origami detail page: title, description, skill level, time, XP, steps with navigation (prev/next), favorite toggle, complete button
Step navigation: next step, previous step, progress bar updates
Completion flow: complete button on last step → marks origami as completed → shows 'Completed!' badge
Favorites: toggle favorite button → heart icon changes color
Subscription page: accessible from profile (if trial/expired), shows pricing, PayPal/Apple Pay/Google Pay buttons

mocked_integrations.paypal_payment: POST /api/subscription/activate - instantly activates subscription without real PayPal integration. In production, this would verify PayPal payment before activation.

notes: Admin user (admin@origami.com) has subscription_status='active', so no trial banner is shown in profile
Test users created via registration get subscription_status='trial' with 30-day trial period
All 15 origami projects successfully seeded in database
Featured origami endpoint returns random 6 items from database
Seasonal endpoint correctly determines current season based on month (January = winter)
Progress tracking works correctly - step updates, completion, XP rewards, favorites all functional
Search and filter functionality working on browse tab
Tab navigation working via tab bar at bottom of screen
Mobile-first design with proper touch targets and spacing
All testID attributes present for automated testing
